subcodes.first_line: This epistle belongeth to this Prisoner and is, like unto the garment of Joseph of divine Egypt, adorned with the word "All-Seeing" - the garment of the servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه این مسجونست باسم منیر و قمیص یوسف مصر الهی ست بکلمه بصیر قمیص غلام
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
